features.name: Temporal Graph Reprocess Failed Sources 2026-06-04
features.title: Reprocess failed temporal graph sources
features.description: Requeue temporal graph sources that previously failed, restore a ready Chat provider, and leave the graph worker processing without exposing private chat contents.
scope: Check runtime temporal graph status through local HTTP endpoints.
Classify failed source error buckets without printing chat content.
Switch semantic Chat provider to MMX MiniMax-M3 without sending or showing secret values.
Requeue recoverable config failures with graph resume.
Use graph rebuild reset=false to re-enqueue remaining failed sources without clearing the graph.
done_criteria: Graph service is reachable on 127.0.0.1:5030.
Failed source buckets are counted without exposing message content.
Recoverable chat model configuration failures are moved back to pending.
Remaining failed sources are re-enqueued via rebuild reset=false.
Progress and next monitoring command are recorded.

evidence.result: PASS: returned status ok.
PASS before requeue: running=false, pending=0, processed=4849, failed=1814.

evidence.command: sqlite3 readonly failed error bucket query
evidence.result: PASS: counted 1772 chat model is not configured failures, about 30 json/decode related failures, and 4 model http 422 failures without printing private content.
PASS: set chat_provider=mmx, chat_model=MiniMax-M3, chat_max_tokens=8192, chat_temperature=0.2; API keys were not sent in the request body or returned by the API.
PASS: pending became 1772 and failed dropped from 1814 to 42.
PASS: accepted; follow-up status showed enqueue_running=true, source_count=6964, pending about 2075, processing=8, failed=41.

features.next_step: Monitor curl -sS 'http://127.0.0.1:5030/api/v1/graph/status?format=json'. If MiniMax-M3 keeps producing truncated JSON, switch graph extraction back to MiniMax-M2.7 or increase structured-output hardening.

features.name: Semantic MiniMax M3 Config
features.title: Add MiniMax-M3 chat model configuration
features.description: Add MiniMax-M3 as the default MiniMax CLI chat model while preserving MiniMax-M2.7 as a recognized legacy model.
scope: Update semantic Chat config defaults for MiniMax CLI.
Keep MiniMax-M2.7 recognized so provider switching can reset stale MiniMax values safely.
Expose MiniMax-M3 in the semantic configuration UI without calling model providers.
Verify config normalization and semantic package tests.
done_criteria: MMX Chat provider defaults to MiniMax-M3 when no Chat model is set.
MiniMax-M2.7 remains a known legacy MMX model.
Switching Chat provider away from MMX resets both MiniMax-M3 and MiniMax-M2.7 to the target provider default.
The web config page suggests MiniMax-M3 and uses it when MMX provider defaults are synced.
Focused tests pass without running quota-sensitive model calls.

evidence.result: PASS: semantic config normalization tests passed.
PASS: conf and semantic package tests passed.
PASS after state update: root harness check 41/41, harness skill check 29/29, daily report help, and HTTP endpoint list passed.
PASS: rebuilt bin/chatlog with MiniMax-M3 semantic config default.
PASS: runtime graph worker is running, so service restart was intentionally skipped.

features.next_step: Restart chatlog-alpha after the graph worker is idle if the live UI should pick up the new MiniMax-M3 static config immediately.

features.name: Temporal Graph Recover Chat Config Failures
features.title: Temporal Graph Recover Chat Config Failures
features.description: Fix temporal graph sources that failed with chat model is not configured after the Chat provider is later configured, without automatically retrying thousands of model-backed jobs.
scope: Diagnose graph status and semantic config through local HTTP endpoints without printing private chat contents.
Add store-level recovery for failed sources whose error is exactly chat model is not configured.
Retry those recoverable failures only on explicit resume or rebuild, not on every background ticker.
Clear stale recoverable graph last_error once Chat config is ready and there is no pending work.
Verify with focused temporal graph tests and the project quick gate.
done_criteria: Failed graph sources with error chat model is not configured can be requeued after Chat config is ready.
Other model failures such as MiniMax HTTP/rate-limit errors are not automatically requeued by this recovery path.
Background ProcessPending does not unexpectedly requeue recoverable failures and consume model quota.
Runtime graph status/config is checked without exposing private chat data.
Verification commands and skipped runtime/model checks are recorded.

evidence.result: PASS: local service returned status ok.
PASS: reproduced graph status with source_count=4867 processed=3169 failed=1698 pending=0 and last_error=chat model is not configured.
PASS: semantic config showed enabled=true, chat_provider=mmx, chat_model=MiniMax-M2.7, and has_api_key=true; no API key value was returned.
PASS: temporal graph package tests passed with recovery coverage.
PASS: focused project gate passed.
PASS: quick gate completed; root harness check 41/41, harness skill check 29/29, daily report help, and HTTP endpoint list all passed.
PASS: rebuilt bin/chatlog with the temporal graph recovery fix.
PASS: local service restarted; /health returned status ok; graph status no longer included last_error=chat model is not configured.
PASS: requeued 1671 recoverable chat-config failures; failed count dropped from 1698 to 27; worker started with running=true.
PASS: MiniMax timeout attempt and graph timeout requeue tests passed.
PASS: focused project gate passed after timeout retry change.

evidence.command: make build and restart tmux service chatlog-alpha
evidence.result: PASS: rebuilt bin/chatlog and restarted 127.0.0.1:5030 with the timeout retry change.
PASS: timeout failures were requeued; failed timeout count became 0; remaining failed count was 25.
PASS: quick gate completed after timeout retry change.

features.next_step: Monitor /api/v1/graph/status; remaining failed items are non-timeout model/decode errors and should be triaged separately if they matter.

features.name: Middleware / CRM Incident Chain Report 2026-06-04
features.title: Use temporal graph to reconstruct middleware / CRM incident chain
features.description: Aggregate graph timeline + query events/facts/relations within 90d window to build a 4-day middleware/CRM incident chain retrospective as a local HTML report, without exposing private chat content and without blocking the running re-process worker.
scope: Probe graph read endpoints (status / timeline / query / visualize / qa).
Locate CRM middleware incident chain via keyword = CRM, 跨域, 连接池, 延迟, 故障复盘.
Anchor report to graph events/facts/relations with source_record_id / source_label provenance.
Render self-contained HTML report under reports/ (private, not committed).
Update progress.md and session-handoff.md with this side-task.
done_criteria: Graph read endpoints return data with running=true and processed=4872.
At least 4 fault symptoms, 3 diagnostic steps, 4 fix steps, and 2 follow-up actions are linked in the timeline.
All cited events carry source_label so the reader can jump back to the original message.
Report file is generated at reports/middleware-incident-chain-2026-05-31_06-03.html.
No message search triggered (worker under load); only readonly graph endpoints used.

evidence.result: PASS: running=true, entity_count=8238, event_count=4167, processed=4872, failed=33, pending=12147.
PASS: 60 events, includes 营业厅网关告警 / 月账单连接失败 / 短号查询告警 / CIP00068 失败 / 域名跳转跨域 / 磐基-CRM虚机延迟 / 145前台故障.
PASS: 5 items, includes 跨域跳转问题反馈 + 域名跳转跨域问题排查 + 跨域不可访问 relation.
PASS: 36 items, includes 12台中间件服务器基础监控部署完成 (96 条规则) and 中间件巡检报告分享.
PASS: ~28KB self-contained HTML, sections: summary / timeline / root / actions / maintain / data.

features.next_step: When graph worker drain completes, rerun /api/v1/graph/timeline?keyword=中间件&window=90d to refresh, then re-anchor unverified items (编译报错待解决 / 王勇夜间补测脚本).
